metadata.name: Change Investment Allocation in a Variable Annuity

description: A contract holder wants to change their future contribution allocation to be more aggressive.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and their current allocation for new premiums.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer and their current investment choices.

nodes.task_description: Take the customer's new allocation instructions (e.g., 80% equity fund, 20% international fund).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the new desired allocation.

nodes.task_description: Update the future premium allocation in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the investment instructions for all future payments.
